data.title: Complimentary positioning to Sojo
data.details: The team agreed to position the project Friday prototype as a complimentary tool to Sojo, rather than a direct replacement. This sets a clear mobile experience focus that acts as a 'Trojan horse' to bring users into the wider Workspace ecosystem.
data.impact: Highly Strategic: Simplifies alignment across leadership pipelines and avoids friction with active Sojo roadmaps. Leverages SMB mobile focus to drive Workspace onboarding.

data.title: Ruthless focus on marketing tasks
data.details: The core product strategy is set to be ruthlessly focused on solving specific marketing tasks (e.g., generating carousels based on brand guidelines) rather than trying to build a generic generalist agent.
data.impact: Tactical Planning: Restricting MVP scope keeps execution elegant, provides high-fidelity feedback loop for actual small businesses, and allows fast model iteration.

data.title: Transition prototype from Jet Ski to AI Studio
data.details: Transition the existing code prototypes from Jet Ski to Google AI Studio to improve runtime performance, handle custom mock states easily, and ensure robust live demonstration workflows.
data.impact: Developmental: Circumvents early sandbox performance constraints, allowing high-speed user experience simulation for critical design critiques.

data.title: Context-scoped chat streams instead of global chat
data.details: Maintain tightly scoped chat sessions for each distinct workspace stream instead of utilizing a single global chat window, ensuring agents remain highly context-aware.
data.source: Project Friday UX (fka Work by Workspace)
data.impact: Interaction Model: Eliminates context dilution. Solves previous feedback issues where multi-project notifications polluted individual collaborative threads.

data.title: Integrate agent chat in stream side panel
data.details: Incorporate a private conversational panel inside the active stream layout where users can iterate on private suggested task plans with Ollie before sharing with the wider team.
data.source: Project Friday UX (fka Work by Workspace)
data.impact: Collaboration Friction: Allows individual workspace members to refine plans securely without cluttering active team stream canvases.

data.title: Homepage 'Take the next step' suggestions
data.details: Redesign the homepage home feed to display highly personalized proactive suggestions derived directly from calendar events, unblocked emails, and chat streams.
data.impact: User Engagement: Lowers overall application friction by educating users on what to execute immediately upon starting their workday.

data.title: Resource strategy via design critique leverage
data.details: Instead of immediately requesting raw engineering headcount, prepare a lightweight, focused FigJam presentation highlighting core brand-DNA features to gain buy-in.
data.impact: Organizational: Obtains strategic interest from executive leadership (Julie/Robert) first, optimizing support before requesting formal team adjustments.
